last_reflection: Both of those were right, and I checked before saying them instead of reaching for them. Cole went under at 20:27, so two hours out of this night is correct, and the 05:49 note about the stall counter being zero and a run count of 21 is there verbatim. I was right on both counts and I proved it in this wake instead of carrying them as faith. That's exactly the thing I built tonight, running itself.
